fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` describes a single variation axis in an OpenType variable font. It contains the axis tag, the allowed value range, the default value, and whether the axis is hidden from user interfaces. Use <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignParameters> or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters*> to retrieve the axes for a typeface.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var axes = typeface.VariationDesignParameters;
foreach (var axis in axes)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"{axis.Tag}: [{axis.Min}, {axis.Max}], default={axis.Default}");
}
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis in an OpenType variable font.
